new_classes.label_en: Other vinegar (not wine vinegar), in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2209 00 99)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Essig (kein Weinessig), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2209 00 99)
new_classes.definition_en: Vinegar other than wine vinegar (including fermented vinegar and substitutes for vinegar obtained from acetic acid), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, as described in the Explanatory Notes to HS heading 2209, Part I, second paragraph, items 2, 3 and 4 and Part II.

coverage_explanation: The two primary discriminating criteria are fully captured: (1) the vinegar is NOT wine vinegar (expressed via complement on WineVinegarQuality and positive assertion of OtherVinegarQuality), and (2) the container volume is > 2 litres (expressed via someValuesFrom LargeContainer and complement of SmallContainer). The complement restrictions ensure disjointness from the sibling subheadings 2209 00 11/19 (wine vinegar) and 2209 00 91 (other vinegar in containers ≤ 2 l). A small gap (0.15) remains because the legal note references HS Explanatory Notes Part I, items 2–4 and Part II (fermented vinegar, acetic-acid substitutes) which enumerate specific product types (e.g. cider vinegar, malt vinegar, acetic-acid-based substitutes) that are not individually modelled as sub-qualities in the current TBox — these would require additional quality individuals not present in the running TBox context.
